name: Title: French Onion Soup with Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions finely.
2. Sauté the onions in butter until they are tender.
3. Add water and the bouillon cubes to a pot. Stir in the Kitchen Bouquet.
4. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook for 20 minutes.
5. Toast bread slices under the broiler until golden brown.
6. Spread each slice with butter, salt, pepper, garlic, paprika, and Parmesan cheese.
7. Dice the toasted bread and add to the soup before serving.
